channel.title: New local problems on FixMyStreet
channel.description: The latest local problems reported by users

item.title: Flytipped pieces of white wood outside 26 - please remove, 5th March
item.description:
Flytipped pieces of white wood outside 26 - please remove
Nearest address to the pin placed on the map (from OS Places API): Devonshire Drive, Greenwich
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Obstruction parking, 5th March
item.description:
Several days without parking my car in front of my house 73 Tradescant Road and aggressive neighbour , could you please help us ? neighbour from 75 Tradescant road is owner from this issue, thank you

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Tradescant Road, Oval, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Numerous missed bin collection, 5th March
item.description:
4th consecutive week our recycling bins not collected. Last week missed completely, two weeks prior not collected till Friday. This week not collected today. I have called and reported yet still not collected.
Nearest address to the pin placed on the map (from OS Places API): Eastview Avenue, Plumstead
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Tree was cut down and now there is just a stump in the pavement, 5th March
item.description:
Tree outside 78, Salisbury Road was cut down and now a crooked stump has been left in the pavement- another tree on the opposite side of the road had the stump removed and grinned out this week. Can Bromley arrange this one to be taken out and grinded too please
Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Salisbury Road, Southborough, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Ok Tradescant rod, 5th March
item.description:
Hello, I would like to report a problem on my street. A neighbour has placed cones on the public road to stop other residents from parking, for more then 10 days.This is a public parking area and it is also preventing us from stopping briefly to unload shopping. Please could the council investigate this situatIon

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Tradescant Road, Oval, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Bikes not in allocated space, 5th March
item.description:
Bikes are taking over all the car spaces also making it dangerous to drive on that road esp with cars parked the other side and two way traffic including buses
Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): 10, England's Lane, Belsize Park, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Outside no 2, 5th March
item.description:
Pothole has worsened when the roadworks were carried out to widen the bike path. Damages my car when I’m getting into and out of private parking space
Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): 1, Antrim Grove, Belsize Park, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Large Mirror Dumped, 5th March
item.description:
Large mirror dumped on the grass at the end of Argyle Way. Needs to be removed urgently before it is damaged as Nd becomes dangerous.
Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Sherwood Gardens, Bermondsey, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Flytippng Again!, 5th March
item.description:
Flytippng outside the bin store at Birchmere Lodge again! I have to report this constantly usually more than once and as a consequence more item get flytipped. If it is dealt with quickly maybe this problem would stop.
Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Sherwood Gardens, Bermondsey, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Wait button isn't working, 5th March
item.description:
Tried pressing button lots of times and didn't do anything
Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): North Cray Road, North Cray, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Massive Pothole!, 5th March
item.description:
Huge pothole on the street which has caused me to have a flat tyre and put me out of money!

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Longleigh Lane, Abbey Wood, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Fly tipping, 5th March
item.description:
Sofa and loads of waste
Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): 94, Northumberland Park, Northumberland Heath, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Dangerous objects, 5th March
item.description:
Please have this removed ASAP

Nearest address to the pin placed on the map (from OS Places API): Chester Road, Edmonton
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Lights still out - Oxted court, 5th March
item.description:
I reported all of the lights being out on Oxted court a couple of weeks ago. You have sent someone to fix some of the the lights, but the two outside of my property specifically (number 9) remain broken. Please can you replace them.
Nearest address to the pin placed on the map (from OS Places API): Hindhead Close, Hackney, London
Report on FixMyStreet
item.category: All out - three or more street lights in a row

item.title: Cluster of abandoned lime bikes, 5th March
item.description:
Lime bikes clustered and abandoned

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): 24-25, Crescent Way, Ladywell, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Camberwell Green SE5, south east entrance. Tag on bin., 5th March
item.description:
Please clear
Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Camberwell Church Street, Camberwell, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Fly tipped furniture, 5th March
item.description:
Dismantled furniture has been dumped on the verge opposite No73 Midhurst Hill.

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Midhurst Hill, Bexley, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Trees in ethelbert road, 5th March
item.description:
The trees are dangerous too close to residential homes and parked cars. They need maintenance to prevent falling debris damaging homes, vehicles or god forbid a person/ child.

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): 3, Ethelbert Road, Plaistow, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Street lighting along Nelson Mandela Road since a week ago, 5th March
item.description:
Since last week there is not street light along Nelson Mandela .road This isnot acceptable !the overgrown bushes. And bad maintenance of the path walls make it dangerous for neighbours and public also lt feels unsafe area to walk

Nearest address to the pin placed on the map (from OS Places API): Nelson Mandela Road, Kidbrooke
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Outside Hunter House, 5th March
item.description:
Street light has been off for the last month or two and nobody has done anything to fix it . This creates certain stress on people walking past at night as the whole street is dark on that point.
Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Hunter Street, King's Cross, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet
